Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jul-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Whitney Leeman's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendants Keystone Automotive Operations, Inc. and The Coast Distributions System, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
